parameters-en.Doubles: Selects the number of additional voices, 1-4.
parameters-en.Slop: Controls the apparent tightness or sloppiness of the additional voices. Higher values result in more slop, or more variation between the voices.
parameters-en.Sensitivity: Adjusts the Slop parameter's sensitivity to playing dynamics. At higher values, playing harder generates more slop.
parameters-en.Source: Selects which input signal is sent to the Double Take processing. "Mono" sums the left and right inputs, "Stereo" preserves the stereo input signal, and "Left" and "Right" process only that channel.
parameters-en.Dry Level: Controls the level of the dry (uneffected) signal.
parameters-en.Wet Level: Controls the level of the wet (effected) signal.
